businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from pure EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $395.01 (+0.88%). Motley Fool: 'Should you buy Tesla below $400?' — robotaxi/FSD delays weigh but catalysts await. BofA initiated Buy coverage with $460 target. GTC 2026 opens Monday (3/16) — Jensen Huang keynote expected to spotlight autonomous driving and agentic AI infrastructure. FSD European approval pushed to 3/20. Market cap $1.27T, P/E ~369x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle Sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy Business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
Services/Other: ~10% of revenue. Supercharger network, insurance, parts
FSD/Software: License revenue ~$3B. Subscription conversion accelerating

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme valuation. Very high for EV maker but reflects AI/robotics premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on $2.08 EPS estimate. Still elevated

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down from FY2024's 7.24%. Price cuts + cost increases impacting

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: +73.7% improvement from prior year. Cash generation recovering

keyMetrics.name: Debt Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: $44B+ cash on hand. Minimal debt burden

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Low return on equity. Can improve with margin recovery

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Slight improvement from FY2024's 17.86%. Above EV industry average

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 Opens Monday — Autonomous Driving & Agentic AI Revival
growthDrivers.description: CNBC (3/13): NVIDIA GTC to unveil CPU-centric agentic AI chip pivot. Jensen Huang keynote could catalyze FSD/robotaxi ecosystem reassessment.

growthDrivers.title: BofA Initiates Buy Coverage — $460 Target (+16%)
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/4): Bank of America upgraded to Buy from Hold with $460 target. Positive on robotaxi, energy, and AI transition potential.

growthDrivers.title: China Feb EV Sales +91% YoY Surge — Sales Momentum Confirmed
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): China-made EV sales surged 91% YoY in February, four consecutive months of growth. Tesla rebounds as BYD slows.

growthDrivers.title: FSD European Approval Expected 3/20 — Regulatory Milestone Imminent
growthDrivers.description: Motley Fool (3/14): FSD Netherlands approval pushed from Feb to 3/20. If approved, EU-wide expansion possible. NHTSA data submission (3/9) complete.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: US EV market 50%+ share leader (globally overtaken by BYD). Software/manufacturing/energy/FSD 8.2B miles vertical integration is the core moat.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles of driving data. Overwhelmingly superior training data vs. competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is the North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales 2.26M units (+28%). Overtook Tesla's 1.64M (-9%)

competitors.name: Lucid (LCID)
competitors.detail: Q4 revenue $523M (+123%). Targeting premium EV market

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 launch for mass market entry

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Expanding autonomous taxi service. L4 autonomous driving leader

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'Should You Buy Tesla Below $400?'
recentNews.significance: Robotaxi delays + FSD EU approval pushed to 3/20. P/FCF 248x. Short-term risks but long-term catalysts await.

recentNews.headline: Tesla China Jan-Feb Sales Rebound While BYD Numbers Drop
recentNews.significance: CNBC: Tesla China sales +35% YoY rebound. BYD sales slowing. Shifting global competitive dynamics.

recentNews.headline: Model Y Registrations Down 24% — But It's Actually Good News
recentNews.significance: Motley Fool: Temporary registration decline during model transition. Pent-up demand for refreshed model.

recentNews.headline: Tesla Delivery Slide May Stretch to Third Year — Cash Burn Looms
recentNews.significance: Reuters: Some investors and analysts expect delivery declines to continue in 2026. Earnings pressure may intensify.

recentNews.headline: TSLA Stock: Analyzing the 80% Rally
recentNews.significance: Forbes: +80% gain over past year despite revenue decline and margin compression. AI/robotics/energy expectations driving price.

analystOpinions.notableComment: BofA: Buy initiation, $460 target. Wedbush Daniel Ives: Buy, $600 maintained. MarketBeat consensus $406.84. StockAnalysis 30 analysts Hold consensus $396.15. GLJ Research: Strong Sell $25 — extreme polarization.

risks.title: Continued Robotaxi/FSD Timeline Delays
risks.description: Motley Fool (3/14): FSD EU approval pushed to 3/20. Robotaxi 'H2 2025 promise' unfulfilled. Core growth catalyst credibility declining.

risks.title: Potential Third Consecutive Year of Delivery Decline
risks.description: Reuters (3/11): Some investors and analysts expect 2026 deliveries to decline again. Intensifying EV competition + demand slowdown.

risks.title: P/E 369x Extreme Valuation
risks.description: Historically highest level for an EV maker. P/FCF 248x. Sharp downside risk if earnings disappoint.

risks.title: Musk Risk — DOGE Political Activity + Management Distraction
risks.description: CEO's DOGE activities reduce Tesla management focus. Boycott risk growing.

risks.title: Operating Margin Declining to 4.59%
risks.description: FY2022 16.76% → FY2025 4.59%. Price cuts and cost increases eroding profitability.

buyReasons.title: BofA Buy Initiation + GTC 2026 Catalyst — Next Week Is Key
buyReasons.rationale: BofA $460 target (+16%). GTC Monday + FSD EU approval 3/20 as near-term catalysts. Success could reignite robotaxi narrative.

buyReasons.title: China Sales Rebound — Feb +91% YoY
buyReasons.rationale: Four consecutive months of growth suggesting global delivery recovery. New models + pricing strategy effects.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business +27% Growth — Revenue Diversification
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack/Powerwall revenue $12.8B. Reducing EV dependency with stable growth driver.

buyReasons.title: FCF $6.2B +73% Improvement — Cash Generation Recovery
buyReasons.rationale: $44B+ cash on hand for R&D and capex investment. Strong financial position.

overallOpinion: Tesla at $395.01 remains below both 50-day and 200-day moving averages. BofA's Buy initiation ($460) and China Feb +91% rebound are positive, but robotaxi/FSD timeline delays are the biggest risk.
GTC 2026 opens Monday + FSD EU approval 3/20 are next week's critical catalysts. Success reignites the autonomous driving story; failure cements the 'promises only' image.

P/E 369x and P/FCF 248x cannot be justified by current earnings. Suitable only for long-term investors with conviction in the AI/robotics/energy transition. Near-term, the $400 resistance breakout is key.

sources.name: Motley Fool
sources.description: Below $400 buy analysis, FSD EU approval delayed to 3/20

telegram.hook: 🚗 Tesla $395 — Next Week Is the Real Showdown
telegram.text:

🏦 BofA initiates Buy, $460 target (+16%). Positive on robotaxi, energy, AI transition.

🎪 GTC 2026 opens Monday — Jensen Huang keynote. Agentic AI CPU pivot + autonomous driving spotlight.

🇪🇺 FSD EU approval expected 3/20. Netherlands first → EU expansion possible.

⚠️ P/E 369x, P/FCF 248x. Repeated robotaxi promise delays. Reuters warns of '3rd year delivery decline'.

GTC + FSD approval success = rebound. Another delay = downward pressure.
